name: Luke Valentine
alt_names: ルーク・ヴァレンタイン
description: The older of the Valentine brothers, Luke is entirely unlike his brother, and sports a calm and composed behaviour. like Jan, he does not have any high class vampire abilities, and use a pair of sawed-off M1 Garand rifles as well as knives. Luke challenges Alucard, but grossly underestimate him, and is in the end eaten by Alucards Hellhound.
